g.text: core `requires` only util — it never requires llm-api.
`modelTier` is stored as a String on AgentDefinition /
StepDefinition so core stays independent of the LLM SPI.
tools-http and mcp contribute IntegrationToolProviderFactory impls
mcp via META-INF/services: McpStdio / McpStreamableHttp factories).
independently versioned artifact: no module-info.java and
no reactor module depends on it — consumers put it on the
classpath and the loaders read its shipped indexes at runtime.
Providers also `requires agentforge4j.util` (edges omitted for clarity).
